name: AgriPredict Daily Sync

on:
  schedule:
    # This tells GitHub to run every night at 00:00 UTC
    - cron: '0 0 * * *'
  workflow_dispatch:
    # This adds a "Run" button so you can test it manually anytime

permissions:
  contents: write  # Critical: This allows the bot to save the CSV back to your folder

jobs:
  sync:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: 1. Checkout Repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v3

      - name: 2. Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v4
        with:
          python-version: '3.9'

      - name: 3. Install Dependencies
        run: |
          pip install earthengine-api pandas numpy imbalanced-learn scikit-learn

      - name: 4. Run Sync Script
        env:
          # This connects your GitHub Secret to the Python script
          GEE_KEY: ${{ secrets.GEE_KEY }}
        run: python sync_data.py

      - name: 5. Save Changes to GitHub
        run: |
          git config --global user.name 'AgriPredict-Bot'
          git config --global user.email 'bot@agripredict.ai'
          git add Master_Data.csv
          # This check prevents errors if there is no new data to commit
          git diff --quiet && git diff --staged --quiet || (git commit -m "Auto-update: $(date +'%Y-%m-%d') satellite data added" && git push)
